allow: Bash(node -e "const j=JSON.parse\(require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('plasmic.json','utf8'\)\); const p=j.projects[0]; console.log\('✅ valid JSON'\); console.log\('components:', p.components.map\(c=>c.name\)\); console.log\('icons:', p.icons.length, 'images:', p.images.length\); console.log\('codeComponents:', p.codeComponents.map\(c=>c.name\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const u=require\('@medusajs/framework/utils'\); console.log\('generateJwtToken:', typeof u.generateJwtToken\); console.log\('Modules.AUTH:', u.Modules && u.Modules.AUTH\); console.log\('CONFIG_MODULE:', u.ContainerRegistrationKeys && u.ContainerRegistrationKeys.CONFIG_MODULE\); console.log\('MedusaError:', typeof u.MedusaError\);")
Bash(sed -i 's|http://localhost:9000|http://localhost:9001|g; s|localhost:9000/app|localhost:9001/app|g' CLAUDE.md README.md && grep -n "9001\\|9000" CLAUDE.md README.md | grep -v node_modules)
